emails.subject: J.P. Morgan
emails.body: Cheryl, Regarding the J.P. Morgan electronic agreements in connection with the existing brokerage accounts, ECT Investments has an account with J.P. Morgan but I see no record of an account with ENA either in Lotus Notes or in the files.

emails.subject: Re: J.P. Morgan
emails.body: Re: J.P. Morgan Right, neither the file nor Aneela's list indicated that we wanted such an account; we only determined that we'd need such an account when I doublechecked with Aneela yesterday. Can you enter in lotus notes or catch me while you are doing it so I can see how it is done? Cheryl Nelson Senior Counsel EB3816 (713) 345-4693 Stephanie Panus 03/15/2001 09:28 AM

emails.body: Are we then in the process of opening a brokerage account for ENA? 03/15/2001 09:56 AM Cheryl Nelson Cheryl Nelson Cheryl Nelson 03/15/2001 09:56 AM 03/15/2001 09:56 AM Sent by: Cheryl Nelson
